steps.title: Identify the angle relationship
steps.content: From the figure, the angle marked $x^{\circ}$ and the angle marked $145^{\circ}$ are opposite angles formed where lines $k$ and $n$ intersect. These are vertical angles.

steps.title: Apply the vertical angles theorem
steps.content:
Vertical angles are congruent, so $$x=145.$$
  • A) $x \lt 145$: false, since $x=145$. Eliminate.
  • B) $x \gt 145$: false, since $x=145$. Eliminate.
  • C) $x=145$: true. Match.
  • D) Cannot be determined: false because the vertical angle relationship determines $x$. Eliminate.
C is correct.
